title: Searcoid's Connectedness Concepts in Metric Spaces
description: A visual organization of key definitions and theorems related to connectedness in metric spaces, as presented by Searcoid.
elements: Disconnected Space (Union of Two Separated Sets)
relationships: A Connected Space cannot be expressed as a union of two non-empty separated sets
The continuous image of a connected set is connected
A space with the Intermediate Value Property is connected
